structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-05-30 New Investor; Newfi
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-06-02 07:03:32-07:00

 





ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Capital Markets is excited to launch Newfi, a new Non-QM banked investor. Newfi was previously offered as a brokered option and was converted to banked for a price improvement and more control over the loan process. Newfi offers a more competitive price than both Deephaven and Bayview with a similar product footprint. Please see below for product highlights and pricing color with marketing materials and matrices attached. 

 

Product Highlights: 

*	Loan amounts from $100K to $3.5MM
*	85% LTV
*	FICO as low as 620
*	Income Solutions

*	Full Doc 1-2 years
*	Bank Statement 12-24 months
*	Asset Depletion
*	1099 1-2 years
*	P & L 
*	CPA Gross Receipts

*	DSCR: 

*	Down to 0.80% DSCR
*	Novice Investor permitted

*	Property types: 

*	SFR
*	PUD
*	Warrantable Condo (established projects only)
*	2-4 Units

*	Terms

*	15-year fixed (DSCR)
*	30-year fixed, 30-year fixed with 10-year I.O.
*	40-year fixed, 40-year with 10-year I.O.

*	Purchase, Refinance, C/O Refinance
*	Vesting in Entity permitted (LLC or Corporation) with personal guarantee

Pricing Color

 


Scenario

	DSCR 1.000
